title: Lithium Modpack
description: A sodium based modpack that optimizes this unoptimized game I guess
body:
## **Lithium Modpack**

Lithium Modpack (LiM) is a modpack thats purely focused in optimizing Minecraft.

For optimizing, it mainly uses Sodium, the mod that I consider the best for main optimization. Other mods added are for more options on sodium or optimizing specific things.

The main mods for optimization would be:
- Sodium
- Starlight
- More Culling
  
Examples of mods added for specific things:
- Clumps
- Language Reload
- Cull Leaves
- fast-ip-ping

### **FAQ**
This section will show frequently asked questions between users. This modpack is new, so there won't be any frequently asked questions for now.

Im gonna try to optimize every aspect possible to make this the best optimization modpack ever. Wish me luck!
